# @021.is/spine-query — LLM usage

> TanStack Query wrapper with don't-hammer defaults (dedupe, SWR, no auto-refetch) + a typed, scoped query-key factory.

Install: bun add @021.is/spine-query

## Imports
- `import { makeQueryClient, makeKeys } from "@021.is/spine-query"` — single entry

## API
- `makeQueryClient()` — a TanStack `QueryClient` with tuned defaults: `staleTime` 60_000, `gcTime` 5*60_000, `refetchOnWindowFocus` false, `refetchOnReconnect` false, `retry` 1, `mutations.retry` 0
- `makeKeys(scope, builders)` — typed query-key factory; every key is prefixed with `scope`. Returns `KeyBuilders<T>`
- Type: `KeyBuilders<TBuilders>`

## Example
```tsx
import { QueryClientProvider } from "@tanstack/react-query";
import { makeQueryClient, makeKeys } from "@021.is/spine-query";

const qc = makeQueryClient();
// <QueryClientProvider client={qc}>{children}</QueryClientProvider>

export const eventKeys = makeKeys("events", {
  all: () => [],
  byId: (id: string) => [id],
  listByOrganizer: (orgId: string) => ["by-org", orgId],
});

// useQuery({ queryKey: eventKeys.byId("e_1"), queryFn: () => fetchEvent("e_1") });
// queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: eventKeys.all() }); // ["events"] → wipes all
```

## Notes
- Peer deps (required): `@tanstack/react-query` + `react`. Client-side.
- Override any default per-query when you need it (e.g. `refetchOnWindowFocus: true`).
